title: Prieurella prieurii
taxonomy: Prieurella prieurii is a species of orchid, specifically belonging to the subfamily Tillandsioideae. This classification places it within the family Bromeliaceae, a large group of tropical flowering plants. The Tillandsioideae subfamily is characterized by its epiphytic growth habit and distinctive inflorescence. Prieurella prieurii is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, where it grows on trees and rocks. As a member of the Bromeliaceae family, Prieurella prieurii is closely related to other epiphytic orchids like Tillandsia and Guzmania.
